items.name: Tom's Beans
items.description: Inspired by an advertisement for Apocalypse Rising, a popular ROBLOX survival game, this tin of beans slowly refills 80% of your health. Plus, it gives you a special face decal when chowing down.

items.name: Stone Hammer
items.description: Uggggh. Hammer hurt.  No hit.

items.name: Winters Greatsword
items.description: Wield the power of everlasting frost and might.

items.name: Attack Doge
items.description: So enemies. Much bark. Wow. For those of you that don't speak doge, click on an enemy to send your attack doge after them!  His bark is worse than his bite- because he doesn't bite! Wow.

items.name: Year of the Monkey Lantern
items.description: Celebrate the year of the monkey with this awesome lantern.  The spirit of monkey will protect you!

items.name: Baseball Bat
items.description: Take me out to the ballgame!

items.name: Punk Wrist Cuff
items.description: This extreme wrist cuff instantly transforms you to a tough guy with a cool mohawk and sweet rock moves... mostly head banging.

items.name: Laser Finger Pointers
items.description: The second you equip these, lasers will begin to shoot from your fingers. The color of the laser is up to you. Each click will cycle between a red (does damage), green (heals players), or blue laser (pushes and trips other players). Just be careful--once this is equipped, the lasers will fire! Looks great in places with dynamic lighting!

items.name: Super Slash Cat Claws
items.description: Claw at your foes and do 15-30 damage per swipe. Double click to dash forward while swinging both claws! This will make both claws slash at your enemies, which can do up to twice the damage.

items.name: Arabian Knight Scimitar
items.description: "Son of infamy! Every bone in your body shall be broken if you continue to defy me!"

items.name: Cobalt Interplanetary Light Sword
items.description: Its power other planetary, its glow otherworldly...

items.name: School's Out Launcher
items.description: Schools out- time to launch all your school items at your friends! Launch an apple, book, and diploma for your friends to interact with!

items.name: Caltrops
items.description: An endless supply of spikey little traps that you can use to cover your path.

items.name: ROBLOX Portable Game System (RPGS)
items.description:
A 2d game in a 3d game?  You betcha!  Controls - : "d" is forward
 "a" is backward
 "w" is jump
 "left click" is shoot

items.name: Spray Paint
items.description: Spray paint your favorite decals all over the place!

items.name: Fake C4
items.description:
Tick tick tick...this one's a dud!  Prank your friends with
this fake C4.

items.name: 8-Bit Blaster
items.description: Pew pew pew! Shoot neon red lasers at enemies making a pew pew noise!

items.name: Sword of the Epicblueness
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 16 to 22 damage. Hit the 'Q' key, to shoot blue flames out in all directions, which will knock back your enemies and deal 25 additional damage! This special has a 10 second cool down. The Epicblueness is the stuff of vampires and will restore 25% of your health.

items.name: Mad Murderer Knife
items.description: Stab your enemies to instantly blox them. U mad bro? Yep.

items.name: Foul Poison Fowl
items.description: Shoots poisonous green fire!  Equip the Poison Fowl and watch as it flies around you in a defensive circle, shooting at nearby enemies (25 damage per hit) for as long as five minutes.
